noTouch: dashboard UI or operator HTTP usage endpoint

checks.browser: skip: local policy gateway API endpoint/docs only; no browser UI changes in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because this only hardens the existing local policy simulation/reserve request parsing path plus focused smoke/docs; it does not add network calls, Docker, sponsor keys, durable storage, dashboard UI, or SDK public API changes
knownFailures: New malformed policy-field tests failed before implementation because string gas_budget and negative gas_budget were silently treated as missing/allowed inputs.
notes: Hardens POST /v1/policy/simulate and reserve policy-context parsing so malformed policy field shapes fail closed with BadRequest before policy evaluation or upstream proxying. Also fixes quickstart curl auth placeholders to use the sourced GASKIT_DEMO_APP_KEY shell variable rather than a malformed or non-matching literal placeholder.
